title: Wither Fortress│凋零堡壘
description: Now the Wither has its own home — the Wither Fortress, and you can no longer outmaneuver it.│現在凋靈有了自己的家──凋靈堡壘，你再也無法巧勝它。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Bedrock Crafter](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-crafter).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[Bedrock Crafter](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-crafter)。 ⚠️**
# Function│功能
- In the Nether, Wither Fortresses made of bedrock will generate, which include a main castle, roads, chest towers, and summoning towers.|在下界會生成由基岩組成的凋零堡壘，其中包含主堡、道路、寶箱塔、召喚塔。
  - Main Castle: The area where the Wither roams when idle, with four gates leading outwards.│主堡：凋零怪閒置狀態下活動的區域，有四個門向外延伸道路。
  - Roads: There are three types — straight roads, curved roads, and forked roads. Treasure chest towers always appear at the end of the road.│道路：有直線、彎道、岔路三種，末端總會生成寶箱塔。
    - Streetlights: There is a 5% chance that a streetlight will generate above each bedrock wall on the road, with a bedrock lamp at the top for illumination.│路燈：道路的每個基岩牆上方有5%概率生成，頂端有基岩燈做為照明。
  - Chest Tower: A tower with stairs leading to the top, where a treasure chest containing rich loot awaits.│寶箱塔：一座塔，有樓梯可以爬到塔頂，塔頂有一個寶箱，有豐厚的戰利品。
  - Summoning Tower: Specialized from Chest Towers, each Wither Fortress will always generate 3 Summoning Towers. The original chest slots of the Chest Towers have been replaced with two-block-high bedrock pillars, each topped with a Wither Skeleton Skull Frame, placing a Wither Skull on it will activate it.│召喚塔：由寶箱塔特化而成，一座凋零堡壘固定生成3座召喚塔。原本寶箱塔的寶箱位置被替換為兩格高的基岩柱子，上方有凋零骷髏頭顱框架，放上凋零骷髏頭顱時會啟動它。

- If no Wither resides in this Wither Fortress, and all three Wither Skeleton Skull Frames of the Summoning Towers are activated, the Wither Skeleton Skulls on the Wither Skeleton Skull Frames will shatter and summon new Wither.當不存在定居於此凋零堡壘的凋零怪時，若3座召喚塔的凋零骷髏頭顱框架皆被啟動，那麼凋零骷髏頭顱框架上的凋零骷髏頭顱會碎裂，並召喚出新的凋零怪。
- Wither monsters cannot be summoned through multi-block structures.│無法透過多方塊結構召喚凋零怪。
- If a Wither is outside the Wither Fortress while idle, it will be teleported back to the main castle.│凋零怪在閒置狀態時若位在凋零堡壘外，會傳送回主堡。
## Adjustments and compatibility with Bedrock Crafter│針對Bedrock Crafter的調整與兼容
- If you want to obtain bedrock only from the reward chests in Wither Bastion and do not want to be able to craft bedrock, you can installthe additional file **bedrock_crafter_recipes_tweak**.│如果你希望獲取基岩的方式僅限於凋零堡壘的獎勵箱，而不希望可以合成出基岩，那麼你可以安裝附加檔案**bedrock_crafter_recipes_tweak**。
- If you want [Bedrock Crafter](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-crafter) to be compatible with [6 Stairs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/six-stairs), you can install the additional file **bedrock_crafter_6_stairs**.│如果你希望[Bedrock Crafter](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-crafter)可以兼容[6 Stairs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/six-stairs)，你可以安裝附加檔案**bedrock_crafter_6_stairs**。
## Additional Information│附加資訊
<details>
<summary>Loot│戰利品</summary>

**Note: The following loot table will be drawn 5-10 times.│備註：以下戰利品表會抽取5-10次**

|Item│物品|Stack Count│堆疊數|Weight│權重|Probability│機率|
|-|-|-|-|
|Enchanted Golden Apple│附魔金蘋果|1|²/₅₂|10%|
|Bedrock│基岩|1|²/₅₂|5%|
|Nether Star│下界之星|1-2|⁴/₅₂|10%|
|Beacon│烽火台|1|⁴/₅₂|10%|
|Enchanted Book<small>[[Loot1]](# "Soul Speed with Level I-III")</small>│附魔書<small>[[戰利品1]](# "I-III級的靈魂疾走")</small>|1|²/₅₂|10%|
|Wither Skeleton Skull│凋零骷髏頭顱|1-2|⁶/₅₂|15%|
|Soul Torch│靈魂火把|1-3|⁴/₅₂|5%|
|Soul Lantern│靈魂燈籠|1-2|⁴/₅₂|5%|
|Soul Campfire│靈魂營火|1-2|⁴/₅₂|5%|
|Soul Soil│靈魂土|1-3|⁴/₅₂|5%|
|Wither Rose│凋零玫瑰|1-3|⁸/₅₂|10%|
|Dried Ghast│乾癟幽靈|1|⁸/₅₂|10%|
</details>
